physical.label: Physical
physical.description: Level of physical quality development (strength, endurance, speed, flexibility, coordination)

technical.label: Technical
technical.description: Level of technical mastery, accuracy in game actions

tactical.label: Tactical
tactical.description: Ability to solve game situations, read the game

theoretical.label: Theoretical
theoretical.description: Knowledge of rules, tactical schemes, training theory

functional.label: Functional
functional.description: State of cardiovascular, respiratory systems; HR, VO2max

cognitive.label: Cognitive
cognitive.description: Operational thinking, memory, decision-making under pressure

morphofunc.label: Morphofunctional
morphofunc.description: Anthropometry: height, weight, arm span, body composition

recovery.label: Recovery
recovery.description: Ability to recover after loads, adaptation reserve

coordination.label: Coordination
coordination.description: Special movement coordination: balance, rhythm, differentiation

integral.label: Integral
integral.description: Generalized result of all component interactions. IGS = 0.4·P + 0.25·T + 0.2·Tac + 0.15·Ps
